---
title: "Contact"
---

# Contact

Feel free to reach out if you'd like to connect about projects, internships, or opportunities.

## Contact Information

**Email:** helenaevangelista30\@gmail.com

**Phone:** (925) 235-8265

**LinkedIn:**\
<https://www.linkedin.com/in/jesslyn-e-116b3126a>

**GitHub:**\
<https://github.com/jessevangelistaaa>
